nav.aboutLead: Creative workspace for motion and workflow video.
nav.aboutBody: A compact tool for content creation, AI pipelines, and rendering — focused on real production workflows.

app.updateMessage:
A newer version is available ({current} → {latest}).
Run: npm update -g ideastudio-cli
app.veoNotConfiguredMessage: Gen Video and Workflow Video need a Veo account in Settings (at least token and cookie for the first account). Add configuration and try again.

auth.subtitle: Sign in with your Nano AI account
auth.waitingHint: Finish sign-in in your browser. This screen will continue automatically.
auth.footer: Encrypted connection to Nano AI APIs
auth.tokenInvalid: Account token is invalid or expired. Please try again.
auth.serverUnreachable: Cannot reach local server. Is the app running?

setup.title: Setup
setup.subtitle: Manage system configuration and API connections for AI modules.
setup.geminiNote: Configure Gemini connection for content generation features.
setup.veoNote: Each account: name, token, labs.google cookie, and video tier (Ultra/Pro).
setup.veoTierNote: Default for Video Gen nodes using this account (account 1 = system default).
setup.nanoNote: Used for Nano services in the system (Google Flow API v3).
setup.savedMessage: Settings were saved to the browser (localStorage).
setup.readConfigError: Could not read configuration from localStorage

gen.promptPlaceholderImage: What do you want to create?
gen.promptPlaceholderVideo: Describe the video you want to create…
gen.emptyHint: Enter a prompt and press send to generate {media}
gen.parallelTasks: You can run {count} tasks in parallel
gen.notConfiguredImage: Configure Nano API and a Veo account (token) in Setup.
gen.notConfiguredVideo: Configure Nano API and a Veo account (token + cookie) in Setup.
gen.upscaleFailedMessage: Could not find mediaId or projectId for this image.
gen.policyProminentPeople: Reference image may contain a public figure. Please use a different image.
gen.policySafety: Content rejected by safety policy. Change the prompt or reference image.
gen.successNoImageUrl: API succeeded but image URL is missing
gen.successNoVideoUrl: API succeeded but video URL is missing
gen.upscaleNoUrl: Upscale finished but no image URL returned

project.subtitle: Manage workflow canvas — pick a project to continue or create a new one.
project.emptyText: Create your first project to start building AI workflows.
project.deleteMessage: Delete this project and all assets?

flow.defaultModelsNote: Video tier follows Veo accounts in Setup. Per-node model changes do not affect these defaults.
flow.restoreSnapshotMessage: Restore this version? The current canvas will be replaced.
flow.noProjectSave: Select or create a project before saving.
flow.savedMessage: Flow saved to the server successfully.
flow.invalidJsonMessage: File must contain a "nodes" array (same format as Export).
flow.importMessage: Replace the current flow with the structure in the file?
flow.missingContentMessage: Chat with AI to refine your idea, then click Create nodes.
flow.clearFlowMessage: Remove all nodes and connections in this project?
flow.chatAiImageOnly: Chat AI only accepts image inputs (Image Input or Image Gen).
flow.chatAiMaxImages: Chat AI accepts at most 3 input images.
flow.invalidConnectionImageVideo: Image Gen / Video Gen only accept image references (Image Input or Image Gen), not video output.
flow.invalidConnectionPreview: Video Preview output may only connect to a Source node.
flow.invalidConnectionSource: Source only accepts input from Image Input, Image Gen, Video Input, Video Gen, or Video Preview.
flow.frameStartPortTaken: Start image port already connected. Remove the old edge before connecting another image.
flow.frameEndPortTaken: End image port already connected. Remove the old edge before connecting another image.
flow.frameConnectFull: Already has 2 images (Start and End). Remove an edge before adding more.
flow.ingredientConnectFull: At most 4 reference images. Remove an edge before adding more.
flow.ideaPanelHint: Chat with AI; you can attach images (up to {max}) for script ideas. When ready, click Create nodes.
flow.startHint: Press to run automation from this node.
flow.startConfig: Flow entry node. Keep one Start node on the canvas to run the full flow.
flow.runBelow: Press Run below · ⚙ edit prompt and model
flow.runKlingBelow: Press Run below · ⚙ edit Kling prompt
flow.loopFlowIntro: Sequentially push files into Image Input / Video Input nodes then run automation. You can enter a local folder path directly.
flow.byExtension: By file extension — scan entire tree
flow.bySubfolder: By subfolder — separate image / video folders
flow.afterFlowIdle: After flow finishes (no AI nodes running)

storyboard.title: StoryBoard
storyboard.subtitle: Generate cinematic AI video scripts using a 12-block template — ready prompts per scene.
storyboard.ideaHint: Enter a short idea or outline — AI splits it into storyboard scenes.
storyboard.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. A student under exam pressure, exhausted but still trying...
storyboard.setupSubtitle: Common properties, prompt template, and script idea.
storyboard.emptyHint: No scenes yet. Open setup to enter an idea and generate the AI script.
storyboard.emptySub: About {count} scenes expected for the selected duration.
storyboard.ytHint: Analyze YouTube videos/channels to recreate scripts — coming soon.
storyboard.shotImagePromptHint: Uses character ref + environment ref. STYLE, CHARACTER (pose/expression), ENVIRONMENT fixed — no text or speech bubbles.
storyboard.shotVideoPromptHint: Video prompt using STYLE, CHARACTER, SCENE… structure
storyboard.environmentPromptHint: Single vertical frame — uses project aspect ratio. SCENE TYPE/CAMERA/QUALITY are fixed. No multi-panel.
storyboard.environmentPromptPlaceholder:
STYLE:
anime style, vibrant colors

SCENE TYPE:
Empty establishing shot / background plate

ENVIRONMENT:
[location]

TIME:
[time of day]

WEATHER:
[weather]

LIGHTING:
[lighting]

OBJECTS:
[static props]

ATMOSPHERE:
[mood]

CAMERA:
[wide static frame]

QUALITY:
Ultra detailed environment, cinematic composition, professional lighting, high detail background, clean scene, 4k quality.
storyboard.noShotsGenerated: No shots were generated for this scene
storyboard.setupMinimizedHint: Running in background — expand to see details
storyboard.characterUploadHint: Upload up to {max} reference characters (one image per character). No image? AI analyzes the script, lists main characters (max {max}), then generates a separate full-body reference for each.
storyboard.characterLimitMessage: You can upload at most {max} character images.
storyboard.characterRefHint: One image per character — structured prompt with STYLE, full body, white background. Used as consistent refs across all scenes.
storyboard.characterRefStyleHint: Optional text for STYLE in all character prompts. Style reference images below are applied automatically when generating.
storyboard.characterRefStyleImagesHint: Up to {max} images — sent as style refs when generating characters. No per-image notes needed.
storyboard.needGemini: Configure Gemini API Key in Settings.
storyboard.managerSubtitle: Create and open script projects — auto-saved under metadata/storyboards.
storyboard.emptyText: Create a new project to start scripting and generating scene media.
storyboard.deleteMessage: The project and all files in metadata/storyboards will be permanently removed.
storyboard.renderVideoHint: {count} scene videos ready for the timeline
